ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the region in square meters */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_code" INTEGER /* Code assigned to the zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the zone is located */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the zone in square meters */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the zone */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the zone above sea level */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Type of land use (e.g., urban, rural, forest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zones_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the data variable (e.g., tmmx for temperature) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data variable */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the data class (e.g., D, X, G) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data variable */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating read access */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating write access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES data_variables ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the validation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "errors" TEXT /* Description of errors found during validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id")
)
